sessions.title: Introduction & ANOVA
sessions.description: Kirk Chapters 1-3, ANOVA fundamentals, mediation analysis (Zhao et al. 2010), SAS & R basics, and homework guidance.

sessions.title: Completely Randomized Design & One-Way ANOVA
sessions.description: Kirk Chapter 3, Sums of Squares decomposition, F-test, homogeneity of variance testing, data transformations, and nonparametric alternatives.
